page: Microsoft Azure M416s_8_v2 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the MSv2 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 416 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 208 physical cores of an Intel Xeon 8280L processor operating at 2.7 GHz. The x86_64 architecture supports advanced instruction sets including AVX, AVX512F, and AVX512_VNNI. The server is equipped with an extensive memory capacity of 7600.0 GB, providing approximately 18.27 GB of RAM per core, and includes 4194 GB of local storage.

Benchmark data reveals a distinct trade-off between single-core and multi-core capabilities. Single-core CPU performance is weak, falling into the bottom 25% in stress-ng and Geekbench tests. However, multi-core performance is top-tier, placing in the top 10% across stress-ng, Passmark, and bzip3 decompression tests. Memory bandwidth is exceptionally high, achieving top-tier status for both cached small-block reads at 20870.61 GB/sec and uncached large-block reads at 746.81 GB/sec. Database operations also perform in the top 10%, with Redis SET operations reaching 307.64 million operations per second.

Given its massive resource density, this server represents a high-end hardware class designed for extreme scale rather than budget efficiency. The qualitative trade-off involves accepting lower single-threaded efficiency in exchange for massive parallel processing power and vast memory capacity. It is highly suited for large-scale in-memory databases, massive data warehousing, enterprise-grade relational databases, and heavy multi-threaded data processing workloads.
description: The Microsoft Azure M416s_8_v2 is an x86_64 memory-optimized virtual machine from the MSv2 family, powered by an Intel Xeon 8280L processor with 416 dedicated vCPUs running at 2.7 GHz. It features an exceptional memory capacity of 7600.0 GB and 4194 GB of local storage. While single-core benchmarks are weak, its multi-core performance and memory bandwidth are in the top 10% tier, with cached read bandwidth reaching 20870.61 GB/sec and Redis SET operations exceeding 307 million operations per second. This server is designed for massive resource density, making it highly suitable for large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise relational databases, and intensive multi-threaded data processing workloads where massive memory capacity is required.
og_description: Microsoft Azure M416s_8_v2 is an MSv2 memory-optimized server with 416 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 7.6 TB of RAM, and 4.1 TB of local storage, delivering top-tier multi-core performance and memory bandwidth.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure M416s_8_v2 is a memory-optimized server featuring 416 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 7600 GB RAM, and top-tier multi-core performance.
tagline: A massive memory-optimized instance featuring 416 vCPUs and 7.6 TB RAM, engineered for large-scale in-memory databases and heavy multi-threaded workloads.
bullet_points: 416 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs running at 2.7 GHz
7600.0 GB of system memory providing 18.27 GB per core
4194 GB of bundled local storage with Premium Storage capability
Top-tier multi-core performance and memory bandwidth up to 20870.61 GB/sec
Optimized for massive in-memory databases and heavy ETL tasks
